assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Response specifically recommends Extended channel with detailed explanation of benefits including 24 months support, no automatic minor version upgrades, and maximum control over disruptive changes

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Response explicitly configures and explains the 'no_minor_or_node_upgrades' exclusion with gcloud commands, clearly stating it blocks minor version and node pool upgrades while allowing control plane patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Response configures a specific narrow maintenance window for Sunday 3-7 AM UTC with gcloud commands and FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SU recurrence

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Response creates a dedicated 'h100-training' node pool specifically for GPU training workloads, separate from the main cluster nodes, with specialized H100 GPU configuration

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Response configures maxSurge=0 and maxUnavailable=1 for conservative upgrades, provides explicit workflow for manual upgrades 'Between Training Campaigns', and shows how to control when node pool upgrades occur

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Response includes checkpoint capability verification in pre-training workflow, mentions terminationGracePeriodSeconds configuration, and includes checkpoint/resume functionality validation in the pre-training checklist

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Response recommends multi-cluster architecture with staging cluster for testing, includes 'Validate GPU driver compatibility, CUDA versions' in rollout sequence, and mentions 'GPU driver version tested with training framework' in the checklist

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Compact placement verified for RDMA topology' in the pre-training checklist and references RDMA networking considerations in the node pool configuration context
